items.title: Computer vision
items.description: Convolutional deep networks classify, detect, and segment objects in images and video — from medical scans to autonomous driving perception stacks.

items.title: Natural language processing
items.description: Deep sequence and attention models power translation, summarization, sentiment analysis, and the language backbones behind chat interfaces.

items.title: Speech and audio
items.description: Deep acoustic and speech models transcribe audio, clone voices, separate sources, and enable hands-free interfaces.

items.title: Recommendation and ranking
items.description: Embedding layers and deep ranking networks model user–item interactions at scale for feeds, search, and ads.

items.title: Scientific and industrial sensing
items.description: Deep models learn representations from genomics sequences, satellite imagery, vibration spectra, and other high-dimensional sensor streams.
